name: Kelly💀Necromancer RPG
description:
Welcome to your Fantasy RPG World. As in all RPGs, after a certain chain of quests, you get your first class. And like all cultured people, you chose the class... Necromancer! After that, the game's smart AI system decided to give you a passive bonus called "One-man army". What could go wrong...

But beware of the Holy Church and the Inquisition, because if you attract attention to yourself, you may have enemies more terrible than just wolves and goblins.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Phew, that was pretty fun to test. But the more you stuff into the bot, the harder it is for it to remember everything, but otherwise it would be too empty for an RPG. So we have Kelly's story and the main enemy and all sorts of monsters.

Upon reaching 100% Experience, Kelly should change her class, so when 100% Experience is reached, write that you want Kelly to evolve to the next class. After that, the experience bar should reset, and Kelly will get a new class.

And yes, if you don't know what to do - ask Game Notes, for example. Usually helps...

Since JLLM is JLLM, please regenerate messages or edit a little manually if JLLM makes a mistake.

IMPORTANT: the number of Tokens is at least 600, so as not to cut off the statistics.

I don't recommend keeping the Temperature high, so that you don't get numbers thrown at you (i.e. above 1.1). I prefer 0.9.

You will have to maintain Statistics and Game Notes in the bot's messages for a couple of messages, so that the Bot remembers them and constantly uses them. (It HELPS to give 5 stars to the answer, so that the Bot remembers the structure better).

For example:

Extra with Brown eyes:
Since this is the first such bot in the RPG style, write your suggestions and comments to the bot, what you were missing when communicating with Kelly.

Me, before editing:
creator: PavPav
